name: Robinhood Markets, Inc.
one_liner: Commission-free retail brokerage platform enabling everyday investors to trade stocks, options, crypto, and futures, and access banking and wealth-management services.
key_products: Robinhood Brokerage (stocks, ETFs, options, crypto, futures)

ambiguities: total_raised_usd reflects the ~$2.1B raised in the July 2021 IPO per Wikipedia; pre-IPO venture rounds totalled ~$539M through Series D (2018) plus Series F ($280M) and Series G ($200M), bringing pre-IPO total to ~$1.02B — combined figure used is IPO proceeds only as the most-cited single figure; full cumulative pre+IPO total is approximately $3.1B but Crunchbase exact figure was paywalled.
headcount of 2,900 as of Dec 31 2025 per stockanalysis.com (sourced from SEC filings); Bullfincher shows a conflicting figure of 2,300 — stockanalysis SEC-sourced figure preferred.
tech_stack details are inferred from Crunchbase technology page, Quora engineering descriptions, and SEC filings referencing cloud infrastructure; no official engineering blog data confirmed.
